ここは人が一杯だなぁ～。<br>まるでお祭りみたいだ。: Damn, it's crowded here! Feels just like a festival.
知ってるか？ ホウライでは、夏のお祭りの時に、<br>みんな『法被』ってのを着て:
Hey, didja know? In Hourai during summer festivals, everyone wears
these 'happi coats' and dances.
ん？ なんで『法被』を着るのかって！？<br>え～と……な、なんでだろうな……: Huh? You're askin' why they wear 'em? Umm... beats me.
あ、あれじゃないか？ 心がハッピーになるからじゃないか？<br>みんなでアレ着て:
Ah! Ain't it 'cause wearin' a happi coat makes ya happy? When
everyone puts 'em on and dances, it gets everyone all happy!
今度、前線基地でもやってみるか？<br>ハッピーに踊れば、みんなの士気もあがるん:
Hey, how 'bout we try this at the Forward Base? If we dance happy,
it'd boost morale, right?
